response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple domains and languages, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle database expertise, or any exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking systems — all mandatory requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern technologies and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance systems and open-source tools
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks
concerns: No visible professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial context
